description:
Every orange cat parent knows what's up. These goobers can't be trusted as far as they can yeet your glasses off the counter, but they melt your dang heart with a single googly-eyed treat stare. Here we have 15 minutes of these orange lovable kitties!

We're the happy place for animal lovers!  You’ll always find real pets, real joy and real moments that remind you why animals make life better, here at The Pet Collective.  

✨💕🐶Subscribe to The Scoop for our most entertaining pet videos, helpful
title: Typical Orange Cat Behavior 🙄 | Funny Cat Fail Compilation
